scripts.security:secrets: gitleaks detect --source . --no-git --report-format json --report-path gitleaks-report.json && echo '✅ No secrets found' || (cat gitleaks-report.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f\"  ⚠️  {h[\"RuleID\"]}: {h[\"File\"]}:{h[\"StartLine\"]} — {h[\"Secret\"][:4]}***{h[\"Secret\"][-4:]}\") for h in data]; sys.exit(1)")
